summary:
Proposes 7 chapter structures for pirate niche based on YouTube documentary storytelling research:
1. HEIST_SEQUENCE — raid/capture blow-by-blow
2. MECHANICAL_AUTOPSY — how the machine/system works
3. ORIGIN_MUTATION — transformation from X to Y
4. MYTH_TRIAL — pop culture vs historical reality
5. POWER_PLAY — scheme from ambition to consequence
6. SURVIVAL_LENS — immersive horror of daily reality
7. GHOST_EVIDENCE — archaeological discovery and legacy
Includes phase-structure affinity map, variety rules, and comparison with biography/battle niches.
